name: National Fellowship & Scholarship For Higher Education Of Scheduled Tribe (ST) Students
benefit_description: A. Value of Fellowship: The applicant selected for the scholarship will be entitled to the stipend as stipulated in the following table subject to fulfillment of conditions laid down in the scheme. 1. Course: M.Phil Stream: Humanities & Social Sciences Scholarship Monthly: Rs.31000/- Contingency Ann
details: Part-A: Fellowship Scheme The National Fellowship Scheme is a Central Sector Scheme by the Ministry of Tribal Affairs with the objective to provide financial assistance to meritorious students from Scheduled Tribes to enable them to pursue higher education (M.Phil or Ph.D.) after completing a post-graduate degree (Master's degree). Salient Features of the Scheme - Fellowship under the Scheme will be for pursuing MPhil, Ph.D. by those ST students who have passed the Post-graduation/Master's Degre
eligibility_text: Part-A: Fellowship Scheme 1. Eligibility Criteria and Course Duration Eligibility:- (i) Post-Graduation and should have taken admission in the universities covered under the category. (ii) The candidates should have a minimum of 55% marks at the final examination/grading at the PG level. (iii) There are no income criteria for eligibility in respect of this scholarship.
